series_metadata.series_description: File contains Hard copy ID badge request forms, vendor security access request forms, Lausche Lottery visitor log, temporary ID card/parking pass log; ID cards issued, and card swipe transactions are recorded electronically.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital information on ID cards in the system for one (1) year after the separation of the employee or vendor employee. Retain digital logs of ID card swipe activity in the system for one (1) year, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain hard copy of Lausche Lottery visitor log and temporary ID card/parking pass log in the Security office for six (6) months, then destroy. Retain hard copy ID badge request forms and vendor security access request forms for two (2) years, then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
